root.sql:
SELECT vr_nsk_015_006000.membership_no, vr_nsk_015_006000.loan_contract_no, vr_nsk_015_006000.member_name, vr_nsk_015_006000.member_surname, vr_nsk_015_006000.seq_no, vr_nsk_015_006000.loan_payment_date, vr_nsk_015_006000.interest_from, vr_nsk_015_006000.interest_to, vr_nsk_015_006000.period, vr_nsk_015_006000.item_type_code, vr_nsk_015_006000.payment_amount, vr_nsk_015_006000.interest_amout, vr_nsk_015_006000.principal_balance, vr_nsk_015_006000.interest_calulate, vr_nsk_015_006000.interest_arrear_bal, vr_nsk_015_006000.sign_status , vr_nsk_015_006000.loan_type , vr_nsk_015_006000.loan_type_description , vr_nsk_015_006000.member_group_no FROM vr_nsk_015_006000 ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and vr_nsk_015_006000.loan_payment_date between '!loan_payment_date_1!' and '!loan_payment_date_2!' and vr_nsk_015_006000.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
/*WHERE*/
